title: Finding Silence in Langtang
excerpt: Three days above 4,000m with no phone signal and everything to think about. The mountains don't ask questions — they just hold you.

title: What My Paintings Said That My Words Couldn't
excerpt: I picked up a brush to say things I couldn't say in policy meetings. Here's what came out.

title: On Mountains, Menstruation, and What We Don't Talk About
excerpt: A reflection on trekking culture, body autonomy, and why I started painting menstrual blood on canvas.
